Methyl 7-isopropyl-3-(2-thienylethynyl)azulene-1-carboxylate (9): The procedure used for the preparation of 5 was adopted here. Reaction of 4(505 mg, 2.00 mmol) with 2-iodothiophene (630 mg, 3.00 mmol) in triethylamine (20 mL) and THF (20 mL) in the presence of CuI (38 mg,0.10 mmol) and tetrakis(triphenylphosphine)palladium(o) (116 mg,0.10 mmol) at 50C for 3 h followed by column chromatography on silica gel with toluene afforded 9  (623 mg, 93%).
